untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (two distinct bottoms separated by weeks/months with specific structural constraints: no lower lows to the left of first bottom, price rise after right bottom) cannot be expressed using only price, moving averages, and standard momentum indicators. Requires candlestick pattern recognition and multi-bar swing point analysis not available in allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Signal is a complex reversal pattern requiring visual/structural pattern recognition. Approximated with: (1) price touching 20-bar Donchian lower band (representing bottom formation), (2) confirmation above pivot level. However, this fails to capture the core requirement of TWO DISTINCT BOTTOMS separated by time with rising price between them. True implementation requires custom pattern detection logic outside standard indicator set. Exit uses pivot as reversal threshold per author's typical exit methodology.
